Items.Title: 关键词研究的5个步骤 | 5 Steps of Keyword research
Items.Description:
信息图：关键词研究的 5 个步骤
在您的内容页面或网站或在线页面上拥有许多新的追随者和访问者真是太好了。 这会增加您网页的流量。 增加页面流量的原因之一是为您的内容使用或使用正确的关键字。

关键字是用户通过任何搜索引擎最常搜索的词，它使任何搜索引擎都可以在搜索页面上显示您的页面。

因此，出现在搜索页面上会间接增加您页面的访问量。 最好的和初级的关键字会带来令人愉快的 SEO（搜索引擎优化）活动。

关键字研究是探索关键字并利用它们来增强您的 SEO（搜索引擎优化）活动的过程。 这可以通过许多工具来实现，这些工具将最常用的词放在搜索引擎中进行搜索。

关键字很重要，因为它们会告知搜索引擎您网站或在线页面上的内容。 关键字是用于搜索重要主题以提取信息的词。 关键字是关于用户的。

元描述：

他们是：

  1. 关键字探索或研究

  2. 你写的内容

  3. 链接建设

关键字探索是最重要的功能，可以增加流量。 您可以在博客中拥有最好的内容和链接建设

流量低，因为您没有正确研究和使用关键字。 以有效的方式使用关键字，您可以使您的页面出现在搜索页面的第一页上。

关键字探索的 5 个步骤如下所述：

从一个主题基本关键字开始：
您需要在您的网页或在线页面上收集与您的主题相关且相关的关键字。 您需要明确要撰写的主题以探索关键字。 您可以开始探索一个主题的关键字，而不必担心您拥有的每个主题。 开始缓慢而稳定。 一开始，您一定不要为需要高水平研究或大量关键字研究的主题探索关键字。 您可以从探索关键字的基本主题开始。

您需要清楚用户意图。 用户意图是用户在搜索引擎上搜索查找信息的一种方式。 您还应该清楚用户意图。 这有助于改善您的内容。 您还可以检查用户意图是否针对您的网页或在线页面的业务目标。

着陆页针对或关注网页的用户意图。 探索主题时，您应该牢记着陆页。

种子关键字是您在分析和构思整个主题的关键字时使用的开场关键字。 您需要明确主题的种子关键字。

您需要记住，您的种子关键字是与主题相关并确保用户意图的包容性和综合性关键字。 您将需要利用此种子关键字来查找与该主题相关的确定和特殊关键字。

分析发现更多关键词：
当您分析和发明更多关键字时，您需要以提高数量而不是质量为目标。 如果关键字与用户意图匹配或具有相同的含义，则可以使用它。

在查找用户使用的关键字时，您需要有公平和正直的心态或观点。 您需要确保关键字与用户意图一致。 您需要确保分析的关键字与您想到的目标网页一致。 您可以连接同义词、单数/复数词、形容词等。

您需要注意并感知已经为您的目标网页排名的低处理关键字。 您可以将 Google Search Console 的效果报告用于您的登录页面。 通过这种方式，您可以观察到已经在 Google 的第一页和第二页上排名的关键字。

您可以使用 Google 关键字规划师。 它是一种用于搜索引擎优化的关键字探索工具。 您可以通过在 Google 关键字规划器中填写您的种子关键字来使用它，并且您可以评估 Google 的关键字建议。 如果您找到了一个好的关键字，您可以恢复新关键字，并且您可以经常使用此过程添加新关键字。

了解竞争对手的研究很重要。 在这里 Ubersuggest 可以免费使用。 您可以以低成本使用 SERanking，而 SEMrush 是首选。

您可以使用上述任何竞争对手的工具。 您可以从竞争对手的研究中准备与用户意图相关的最终关键字列表。

您需要过滤掉关键字：
您需要放置正确数量的关键字，这使得目标更容易实现。 您可以升级或排队至少 5-6

关键词。 最多可包含 15-20 个关键字。 确保所有关键字都与用户意图相关。

您需要定位每月搜索量最高的关键字。 要知道搜索量最高的关键字，您需要获取每个关键字的 Google 每月搜索量并加以利用。 您也可以将 Google 关键字规划器用于数量，但只有在您拥有 Google 广告帐户时才能使用它。 因此，如果没有 Google 广告，您可以使用 Ubersuggest 等免费工具。

您需要退出与您的业务相关的对齐关键字较少的关键字。 您需要退出低容量关键字....阅读更多



原文:

Infographic: The 5 Steps of Keyword Research
It’s so good to have many new followership and visitors to your content page or website or online page. This increases the traffic to your webpage. One of the reasons that enhance the traffic to your page is using or utilizing the correct keywords for your content.

Keywords are the words that are most frequently searched by users through any search engine which enables any search engine to show your page on the search page.

So, appearing on the search page indirectly increases the traffic to your page. Finest and primer keywords lead to a delightful SEO (search engine optimization) campaign.

Keyword research is the process of exploring the keywords and utilizing them to enhance your SEO (search engine optimization) campaign. This can be achieved by numerous tools which give the most frequently used words to search in search engines.

Keywords are important as they inform the search engines about your content on your website or online page. The keyword is the word that is used to search for a significant topic to extract information. The keyword is all about users.

Meta description:

SEO is not so easy, but it can make it easy through 3 preliminaries:

They are:

  1. Keyword exploration or research

  2. Content you write

  3. Link building

Keyword exploration is the most vital feature which can increase traffic. You can have the best content and link building in your blog

with low traffic because you didn’t research the keywords correctly and utilized them. Using keywords in an efficient way you can make your page appear on the first page of the search page.

The 5 steps for keyword exploration are described below:

Start with one topic fundamental keyword:
You need to collect the keywords which are related and relevant to your topic on your web page or online page. You need to be clear on the topic you want to write about to explore keywords. You can start exploring keywords for one single topic rather than worrying about every topic you have. Start slow and steady. In the beginning, you must not explore keywords for the topic that needs high-level research or high-volume keyword research. You can start with a basic topic for exploring keywords.

You need to be clear on the user intent. User intent is the one user searches for finding the information on search engines. You should have clarity on the user intent also. This helps in improving your content. You can also check the user intent is disposed to your webpage or online page business aims.

Landing page targets or focuses on the user intent of the webpage. You should keep the landing page in your mind when exploring a topic.

Seed keywords are the opening keywords you utilize when you analyze and conceive keywords all over the topic. You need to have clarity on the seed keyword on your topic.

You need to keep in mind that your seed keyword is the inclusive and comprehensive keyword that is related to and assures the user intent of the topic. You will need to utilize this seed keyword to find determine and peculiar keyword related to the topic.

Analyze and discover more keywords:
When you analyze and invent more keywords you need to target enhancing the quantity than quality. If the keyword matches or gives the same meaning as user intent, you can utilize it.

You need to have a fair and upright mindset or viewpoint in finding the keywords users use. You need to make sure the keyword aligns with the user intent. You need to ensure that the analyzed keywords align with the landing page you have in mind. You can adjoin synonyms, singular/plural words, adjectives, etc.

You need to notice and perceive the low-handling keywords that have already ranked for your landing page. You can use Google’s Search Console’s performance report for your landing page. By this, you can observe keywords that are already ranked on the first and second pages of Google.

You can use Google keyword planner. It is a kind of tool for keyword exploration for SEO. you can use this by filling out your seed keyword in the Google keyword planner and you can evaluate Google’s keyword recommendations. If you found a good keyword you can restore the new keyword and you can frequently use this process to add new keywords.

It’s important to know about competitor research. Ubersuggest, SERanking, SEMrush discloses or tells us about the competitor research. Here Ubersuggest is free to use. You can use SERanking at a low cost and SEMrush is a premier.

You can use any competitor tool mentioned above. You can prepare a final list of keywords that are relevant to user intent from competitor research.

You need to filter out the keywords:
You need to put the right number of keywords this makes the target easier to achieve. You can level up or line up for a minimum of 5-6

keywords. The maximum number can be up to 15-20 keywords. Make sure all keywords are relevant to user intent.

You need to target the keywords that have the highest monthly search volume. To know the highest volume keywords, you need to get Google’s monthly search volumes for each keyword and utilize them. You can also utilize Google keyword planner for volumes, but you can use this only if you have a Google ads account. So, if don’t have Google ads you can use free tools like Ubersuggest, etc.

You need to quit on the keywords with fewer alignment keywords concerning your business. You need to quit on low-volume keywords....Read more
Items.Author: ayushjha16

Items.Title: React - 清洁架构 - Redux 工具包 | React - Clean Architecture - Redux Toolkit
Items.Description:
该项目是一个示例代码，用于将 Clean Architecture 引入 Web 服务或同时使用 Redux Architecture 和 Clean Architecture。

如果您有任何建议或意见，请告诉我。

使用堆栈

存储库链接

清洁架构

与各种架构一样，干净架构的主要目的是分离关注点。 根据每个兴趣划分层次结构，设计以领域为中心而不是详细实现，并确保内部区域不依赖于框架或数据库 UI 等外部元素。

  • 区分详细的实施领域和领域领域。
  • 架构不依赖于框架。
  • 外部区域可以依赖于内部区域，但内部区域不能依赖于外部区域。

  • 高级和低级模块都依赖于抽象。

  • 实体：实体封装了业务规则或最通用的高级规则。 实体可以是具有方法的对象，也可以是一组数据结构和函数。 当外部事物发生变化时，它们最不可能发生变化。

  • 用例：用例层包含特定于应用程序的业务规则。 它封装并实现了系统的所有用例。这一层的变化会影响特性。 该层不应受到数据库、用户界面等外部性变化的影响。 用例层与这些关注点隔离开来。 应用程序操作的更改不会影响用例。 如果用例的细节发生变化，那么该层中的某些代码肯定会受到影响。

  • 接口适配器：适配器层是一组适配器，用于将数据从用例格式和实体转换为外部层（如数据库或 Web）的格式。

  • 框架和驱动程序：模型的最外层通常由框架组成，例如 Web 框架数据库。

  • 跨越边界：在图表的右下角，控制器和演示者与下一层的用例进行通信。 控制流：它从控制器开始，通过用例，然后通过演示者运行。 还要注意源代码依赖关系：每个都指向用例。

遵守这些简单的规则并不难，它将创建一个可测试、可维护并具有所有好处的系统。 当系统的外部部件之一过时时，可以在最短的时间内完成更换。

清洁架构实施

在以抽象的方式定义干净架构之后，这是该架构在该图描述的 Web 应用程序上下文中的投影：

  • 实体和用例协同工作，是系统的中心。 与框架第一层的通信是通过接口使用 DataSource 完成的。

  • 有两个主要部分业务和框架，业务部分是系统中最重要的部分，因为它包含独立于其他部分的业务逻辑。

目录结构

详细的架构概念

为了详细解释这个架构，我们举一个插入注释的简单例子。

  • 首先，我们创建一个 Note 实体。

  • 然后我们定义插入注释的用例以及与框架层的交互。

从这个图中可以测试用例而不需要实际的网络或缓存服务，其他部分也是如此。 现在在交互器目录中我们可以看到不同的用例，例如类（图中的 InserNewNote 示例），这有助于设计一个易于维护的系统，并且已经描述了它提高了团队合作的性能，并且它支持并行工作。

通讯流程

我们可以区分两种情况：

  • 没有网络调用的流程：

代码

截屏

学分



原文:

This project is a sample code to introduce a Clean Architecture to a web service or to use a Redux Architecture and a Clean Architecture together.

If you have any suggestion or comments lets me know.

Use Stack

Typescript, Webpack, React, Redux-toolkit.

Repository link

https://github.com/Abouelyatim/React-App-Clean-Architecture

Clean Architecture

As with various architectures, the primary purpose of a clean architecture is to separate concerns. Divide the hierarchy according to each interest, design domain-centric rather than detailed implementation, and make sure that the internal area does not depend on external elements such as the framework or database UI.

  • Distinguish between detailed implementation areas and domain areas.
  • Architecture does not depend on the framework.
  • The outer zone can depend on the inner zone, but the inner zone cannot depend on the outer zone.

  • Both high-level and low-level modules rely on abstraction.

  • Entities: Entities encapsulate business rules or the most general, high-level rules. An entity can be an object with methods or a set of data structures and functions. They are the least likely to change when something external changes.

  • Use Cases: The use case layer contains application-specific business rules. It encapsulates and implements all use cases of the system.Changes in this layer affect features. This layer should not be affected by changes to externalities such as database, user interface. The use case layer is isolated from these concerns. Changes to the operation of the application do not affect use cases. If the details of a use case change, then some code in that layer will certainly be affected.

  • Interface Adapters: The adapter layer is a set of adapters that convert data from use case format and entities, to format for an external layers such as database or web.

  • Frameworks and Drivers: The outermost layer of the model is usually made up of frameworks such as the web framework database.

  • Crossing Boundaries: At the bottom right of the diagram, the controller and presenters communicating with the use cases in the next layer. The control flow: it starts in the controller, moves through the use case, and then runs through the presenter. Also note the source code dependencies: each points to the use case.

Complying with these simple rules is not difficult, and it will create a system that is testable, maintainable, and with all the benefits that entails. When one of the external parts of the system becomes obsolete, the replacement is done in a minimum of time.

Clean Architecture Implementation

After the definition of clean architecture in an abstract way, here is the projection of this architecture in the context of a web app described by this diagram:

  • Entities and use cases work together and are the center of the system. Communication with the first layer of the Framework is done with DataSource via an interface.

  • There are two main parts Business and Framework, the business part is the most important part in the system because it contains the business logic independently of the other parts.

Directory Structure

Detailed Architecture Concepts

To explain this architecture in detail, we take a simple example of inserting a note.

  • First,we create a Note entity.

  • Then we define the use case of inserting a note and the interaction with the framework layer.

From this figure it is possible to test the use cases without needing the actual network or cache service, and the same for the other parts. Also now in the interactors directory we can see the different use cases like classes (InserNewNote example in the figure) this helps to design a system that is easy to maintain, and has described itself what it improves the performance of the teamwork ,and it supports parallel work.

Communication Flow

We can distinguish two cases:

  • Flow without network call:

1- Click event on the ui.

2- Action dispatched to the store.

3- Find correspond reducer with action.

4- Get current state.

5- Update state.

6- Notify ui to update.

1- Click event on the ui.

2- Action dispatched to the store.

3- Dispatch use case (thunk).

4- Request api.

5- Response from api.

6- Find correspond reducer with action.

7- Get current state.

8- Update state.

9- Notify ui to update.

Code

https://github.com/Abouelyatim/React-App-Clean-Architecture

Screenshot
